title: Dragon Compass
description: An addon for the Isle of Berk Mod that allows you to locate dragons within a set distance.
body:
# Dragon Compass
- A small QOL addon for the Isle of Berk Mod that adds 1 new item. Dragon Tracker a item that scans the area you are in for dragons displays them and lets you get their coordinates in exchange for a single piece of gronckle iron
## What's added?
- Dragon Tracker, a simple item that allows you to track dragons
## How to get it?
> X 1 X

> 1 2 1

> X 1 X
- Above is the crafting recipe
- 1 is Gronckle Iron
- 2 is any Isle of Berk Dragon Egg
